//: Tools are looked up by name in the existing catalog (never created). Names must match real tools.

playbooks.author: bob
playbooks.title: Identify companies visiting your website with HubSpot
playbooks.description: Turn anonymous traffic into named accounts you can act on.
body: HubSpot can reveal which companies visit your site, even before they fill in a form.
Install the HubSpot tracking code, then open Reports → Traffic Analytics → Sources.
Filter by company and export the list to prioritise your outbound efforts.

playbooks.author: bob
playbooks.title: Capture visitors in HubSpot and cold email them with Lemlist
playbooks.description: A simple two-tool outbound loop that runs itself.
body: Sync the companies HubSpot identifies into a list.
Push the matching contacts into a Lemlist campaign via the integration.
Personalise each email with company data and let the sequence run.

playbooks.author: bob
playbooks.title: Notion vs HubSpot for a lightweight CRM
playbooks.description: Which one fits a small team that's just getting started?
body: Notion is flexible and cheap, great for a manual, low-volume pipeline.
HubSpot adds automation, email tracking and reporting as you scale.
Start in Notion, move to HubSpot once deal volume outgrows manual work.
